label: 490_manufacturing_advanced manufacturing_hubs_american manufacturing
description: The U.S. government focused on developing regional manufacturing hubs through innovation and policy initiatives, aiming to strengthen the sector's competitiveness and address challenges like job losses in key industries.

earliest_articles.title: Strengthening American Manufacturing: A New Federal Approach
earliest_articles.excerpt: Manufacturing is essential to America’s economic well-being. It accounts for the bulk of United States exports, is key for innovation, and provides many highwage jobs, especially for less educated workers. It is the economic lifeblood of much of the Great Lakes region. Yet the United States has lost manufacturing jobs…

earliest_articles.title: Accelerating Advanced Manufacturing with New Research Centers
earliest_articles.excerpt: Manufacturing remains a critical sector for the economic health of the nation as a whole and for the states. earliest_articles.title: The Federal Role in Supporting Urban Manufacturing
earliest_articles.excerpt: As the nation works to recover from the Great Recession, the idea of revitalizing the country’s beleaguered manufacturing sector has gained significant traction among political leaders and policy experts. newest_articles.title: Trump administration brings a different approach to manufacturing
newest_articles.excerpt: During the 2016 presidential election, Donald Trump heavily campaigned on restoring manufacturing jobs to the United States. central_articles.title: Why American Manufacturing is Vital to Future Prosperity
central_articles.excerpt: On Wednesday, July 9 Governance Studies hosted the 3rd annual John White, Jr. Forum on Public Policy. central_articles.title: Manufacturing growth—in the Heartland and for America
central_articles.excerpt: The state of U.S. manufacturing is back in the news after GM’s decision last week to close five plants and cut some 14,000 jobs.
